title: oldenlandia galioides
intro: Oldenlandia galioides is a type of flowering plant native to various parts of Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia galioides include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia galioides is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
